target:
My older sister often just goes somewhere on a whim,
It's usual for her…

Why today of all days,
Does she do that?

It's our birthday today…
I'm sure she's forgotten!

Gulp, gulp…
Does my sister have something to drink?
If she's collapsed somewhere, what'll we do?

When she gets absorbed,
She forgets to breathe…
Shinpei, I sense Heine's presence ahead.
If we keep going, Ryunosuke will meet Heine!

What's my sister's friend like?
By the way, why are we meeting here?

No, no, it's not like my sister to do that.
Yeah, it's not.

No good!
He's heading toward Heine!

Was it my imagination…?
I thought I heard someone saying I'd be killed…

Shinpei!
Maybe you actually reached him!

(No time to think about that now!
I have to keep Ryunosuke away from Heine!)
Please go back!! Get out of here quickly!!

It was my imagination…
After hearing cicadas so much, my ears must be messed up.
No good… He still can't hear me…
But just now, it actually worked!
Was that voice from this person?

Are you okay?
Um… are you feeling unwell?
Hah… Hah… I don't want to!
Ow… Why all of a sudden…?
What's with this kid… They're not even sane.

Let's just calm down for now.
You're all dirty in that kimono.
You'll get scolded by your mother.

Can you stand on your own?
If you can't, I'll help you, so move away.

I'm hungry… I don't want to…
I don't want to anymore!!
Ow! What the hell are you?!

I know!
But what should I do…

No good, this kid isn't normal.
Right now, we need to run…

Don't come closer!
Don't come this way!

No good!
The bleeding from his legs is severe…

Hurry up and help!
Shinpei, undo the transformation!
What are you planning to do?!

No good!
The attack went right through…

(Even if the attack doesn't hit,
the kid must be sensing it…)
(I managed to stop her movement for a moment, but that's all…)

(You fool…
What can we do right now…)

(Nagumo-sensei knew the truth
about Ryunosuke being killed)

(If Nagumo-sensei saw the scene with his own eyes,
he must be coming here right now…)

Ushio!
Try to slow Hyaine down a little!
I'll go get Nagumo-sensei in the meantime!
Even if I try to stop her, my attacks won't work!

I'm not sure, but it seems
Hyaine can sense my attacks!

Understood!
I'll do whatever I can!
Did I just hear your voice?!

Nagumo-sensei, hurry!
Ryunosuke is being attacked by Hyaine!

It's not your imagination!
Nagumo-sensei, over here!
Hurry!

This… what's going on?
Why is this happening…
No good, don't get close to that monster!

Hyaine… This is…
Did you do this…?

Nagumo-sensei, run away!
If you don't, you'll be killed too!
Quickly, take Ryunosuke and run away!

Grab Ryunosuke.
Get him away from here fast!

(Hyaine's behavior is strange.
It seems like they're trying to communicate…)
But right now, I'm more worried about Ryunosuke.
